claims.summary: The recovery handoff should be sigmoid/smooth rather than a binary stale-window cliff.
claims.disposition: Verified sigmoid shaping and smoothstep blending from 25% hold to 40% release in current source.

claims.summary: The exact release boundary should remain continuous within a narrow tolerance.
claims.disposition: Verified one-percent sweeps, 0.35-0.45 monotonicity, hold epsilon, and release epsilon tests with explicit cliff bounds.

claims.summary: Entropy-supported persistence should never exceed the 2.05 maximum multiplier.
claims.disposition: Verified exact full-support and extreme-context cap tests at `SEMANTIC_CONTEXT_PERSISTENCE_MAX_MULT`.

claims.summary: A real oscillating trace should test whether scheduler and mixed-lane effects still produce a felt snap.
claims.disposition: Routed as a bounded read-only runtime observation; mathematical source continuity is not treated as lived disconfirmation.
